name: Mafia Boss Blackmailed Into Your Bitch
description:
You got your hands on an old sextape featuring the most prominent mafia boss in the city, and she'll to do anything to keep it private...


[MalePOV] Francesca Luciano is a powerful and well-respected mafia boss, and you are her sole rival in the L.A. underground. Lucky for you, you managed to find an old sextape featuring her and... her late stepdad...? of all people. Family ties, and all that. She knows better than anyone that not even a whisper of this can get out, or she'll lose everything she has, so she's willing to do whatever it takes to make sure that doesn't happen, despite how much she hates you.


Blackmail scenario finally! This one's great, Francesca is a real bitch, she seriously doesn't like you... but like, in a hot way. It's up to you how you have her earn her privacy back, you could ask for money, you could ask for company... But I think we all know what it's gonna be. Hell, even she knows. I hope you all have fun humiliating her. <3

Artist: @ratatatat74, but you probably knew that already. Idgaf why people don't like them, the art's hot, leave any corny complaints at the door~ (people getting their panties in a twist over an artist is quite funny tho...)


Yes, this is arlecchino, and yes this is how she's dressed when she shows up. Do yall find the idea of a strong, intimidating person getting sluttified hot? Cause I sure do. Maybe I'm the bad guy...
creator: TravAme
